stemHtml: For the planning of a flight with an estimated time of departure 0930 local time from an European airport a satellite picture is used to locate areas of fog. What type of satellite imagery available with observation time close to ETD does provide most likely the best information to locate these areas of fog?

options.b: Infrared (IR) and water vapour (WV), polar orbiting system
options.c: Visual (VIS) and infrared (IR), polar orbiting system
